Localization.Description: A connection to winreg (2) and wkssvc (1) named pipes on behalf of the same user from the same host was detected, which may indicate usage of the SharpHound (BloodHound) LoggedOn information collection method

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} used utility {object.process.name} to connect consecutively to winreg (2) and wkssvc (1) named pipes of host {event_src.host}
